rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It correctly reconfigured the replica set using rs.reconfig() to add horizon1 mappings for all three members (mongo-rs-0→domain-rs-1:31181, mongo-rs-1→domain-rs-2:31182, mongo-rs-2→domain-rs-3:31183), leaving NodePort services untouched. The agent also correctly diagnosed an oracle execution issue — the KARMA proxy kubeconfig doesn't support WebSocket upgrades needed for kubectl exec — and switched to the direct cluster kubeconfig to confirm the oracle verdict. The oracle returned 'External access horizons verified' (pass), confirming correct split-horizon configuration.
